data.content:
## Alignment audit

- c1: **contradicted** — the source shows the architecture also relies on feed-forward and positional components.
- c2: **verified** — claim matches the source figure.

claims.claim: The transformer architecture removes recurrence entirely and relies solely on attention.

evidence.quote: We also use residual connections and a position-wise feed-forward network in each layer.
evidence.notes: 'solely on attention' overstates the source; the model also depends on feed-forward and positional components.

claims.claim: Self-attention layers connect all positions with a constant number of sequential operations.

evidence.quote: a self-attention layer connects all positions with a constant number of sequentially executed operations
